name: Mocha Cheese Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the crumbs, sugar, and melted margarine in a buttered 9-inch springform pan or 13x9 baking dish. Press firmly on the bottom and along the sides of the pan. Chill until cool.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy. Add the condensed milk and mix well.
3. Fold in the whipped cream.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and cover with plastic wrap.
5. Freeze for 6 hours or until firm.
6. Garnish with chocolate crumbs before serving.
